name: Basil-Vegetable Saute
recipeIngredient: 1 medium Zucchini, Cut Into 3 x 1/4 inch Strips
1 medium Size Green Pepper, Cut Into 1/4 in. Strips
1 medium Size Red Bell Pepper, Cut Into 1/4 in. Strips
recipeInstructions:
1. Coat a large skillet with cooking spray and add oil.
2. Place over medium-high heat until hot. Add garlic and stir fry for 1 minute.
3. Add the reserved vegetables and stir fry for 2 minutes.
4. Stir in basil, cover, and reduce heat. Cook for 2 more minutes.
5. Serve immediately.
